title: Light and comfortable
review_text: Used these for walking and short runs. Very light and breathable. No break-in needed.

title: Nice shoe but narrow toe box
review_text: I like the cushioning and look, but the front feels tight after an hour. I would try the wide version next time.

title: Great for daily use
review_text: Good value and comfortable for errands and treadmill. Cushion is a little firm for long runs for me.
